subcodes.first_line: O thou dear one of Abdu'l-Baha! Thy recent letter was received and immediately a reply is being sent concerning [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای عزیز عبدالبهاء نامه اخیر شما وصول یافت و فورا جواب ارسال میگردد در خصوص
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @chastisement and requital, @business; financial; property matters
